name: arkadas-erp
description: Arkadaş Özel Eğitim ve Rehabilitasyon Merkezi - ERP Sistemi

scripts.dev: npm run lint && npm run dev:docker && npm run dev:all
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n strapi,web,mebbis,ai,mobile -c blue,green,cyan,yellow,magenta "npm run dev:strapi" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:mebbis" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.dev:ai: cd ai-service && source venv/bin/activate && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.dev:mobile: cd mobile && npx expo start --port 8085 || echo 'Mobile: Run npm install first'
scripts.dev:services: concurrently -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev:mebbis" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && turbo run build
scripts.build:mobile: cd mobile && npx expo export 2>/dev/null || echo 'Mobile: No build configured'
scripts.build:ai: echo 'AI Service: No build step required (Python)'
scripts.start: npm run test:quick && npm run start:all
scripts.start:all: npm run start:docker && concurrently --kill-others --kill-signal SIGTERM -n strapi,web,mebbis,ai -c blue,green,cyan,yellow "npm run start:strapi" "npm run start:web" "npm run start:mebbis" "npm run start:ai"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:ai && npm run install:mobile && npm run install:mebbis:deps && npm run install:docs && docker compose pull
scripts.install:ai: cd ai-service && python3 -m venv venv && ./venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.install:mebbis:deps: cd mebbis-service && npx playwright install chromium
scripts.install:docs: pipx install mkdocs-material || pip install --user mkdocs-material --break-system-packages
scripts.test:quick: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.test:mobile: cd mobile && npx tsc --noEmit 2>/dev/null || echo 'Mobile: Install deps first'

author: Arkadaş Özel Eğitim
